course.title: Computer Science
course.description: Introduction to programming and computer science

assignments.title: Python Basics
assignments.description: Variables, data types, conditionals, and loops

assignments.title: Python Classes
assignments.description: Defining and using classes in Python

assignments.title: Data Analysis
assignments.description: Basics of data analysis: loading, exploring, and visualizing data in Python.

assignments.title: Building REST APIs with FastAPI
assignments.description: Build a practical REST API using FastAPI by creating endpoints for a task management system. Learn HTTP methods, data validation, and error handling.

assignments.title: Writing Tests for Python Code
assignments.description: Learn to write unit tests using pytest. Verify your code works correctly by testing functions with assertions, edge cases, and error handling.
